name: Shengtak New Material Co., Ltd
summary: Shengtak New Material Co., Ltd engages in the production, research and development, and sale of seamless steel pipes for use in industrial energy equipment in China. The company offers alloy steel, stainless steel, and carbon steel pipes for use in power plant boiler equipment manufacturing industries, petroleum refining and chemical enterprises, power stations, and other industries. It also produces and sells pressure-welded steel gratings and ball joint railings for power station boiler manufacturers. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Changzhou, China.
